#!/bin/sh
qemu-system-x86_64 -m 512 -kernel /mnt/iso/boot/vmlinuz-lts -initrd /mnt/iso/boot/initramfs-lts -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -append "modules=loop,squashfs,sd-mod,usb-storage console=ttyS0" -display none -serial telnet:127.0.0.1:6665,server,nowait > qemu.log 2>&1 &

cat << 'EOF' > /app/start.sh
#!/bin/sh
qemu-system-x86_64 -m 512 -kernel /app/vmlinuz-lts -initrd /app/initramfs-lts -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -append "modules=loop,squashfs,sd-mod,usb-storage console=ttyS0" -display none -serial telnet:127.0.0.1:6665,server,nowait > /app/qemu.log 2>&1 &
EOF
chmod +x /app/start.sh
killall qemu-system-x86_64
sleep 1
/app/start.sh
sleep 30
